{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232049106E4063BFCC87573DFD40"}"},"total":219},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7590899991448830744","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者人物刻画各有特点每个角色都很生动让人印象深刻，剧情也很好就是有时候对话感觉有点生硬其他都还好还是很推荐虽然评分低应该是刚开评分的原因"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767400444,"group_id":"7575848611653618750","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0+510GICdFV8CdrZL9e54Y=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2fd9ff6f8a0d40c3983525bfd39a78eb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792699&x-signature=x%2BYVMs4ty%2FvQ6V1nsgJdRUwC4co%3D","user_id":"307500494880807","user_name":"仙 尘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"307500494880807","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575848611653618750","book_info":{"abstract":"“为了召唤第四天灾，我在tga年度游戏颁奖仪式上强推我的穿越游戏。”

李维穿越了，成了异世界“神弃之地”一尊刚刚苏醒、濒临饿死的落魄邪神。 没有系统，没有信徒，只有一座漏风的破神殿和一只来偷吃供品的猫耳娘。

面对外面虎视眈眈的魔物，为了活下去，李维决定利用残留的【欺诈】与【精神链接】权柄，干回自己的老本行——游戏策划。

于是，他在TGA颁奖典礼上搞了一次全球入侵，向地球玩家发出了首测邀请： “想明白生命的意义吗？想真的……活着吗？（划掉）” “全球首款100%全息沉浸式网游《神弃之地》，删档内测开启！”

从此，画风突变。


【小剧场】

猫耳娘米娅： “神明大人太可怕了！他召唤的眷属甚至连史莱姆的粘液都要榨干！” 
人类圣女： “那位端坐于黑雾中的至高存在，哪怕只是注视，都能让我灵魂战栗……但他为什么总是盯着我的钱袋看？” 
某高玩： “策划爸爸！求求了！再开点内测名额吧！我室友临死前想玩一把神弃之地！”

李维（瘫在王座上）： “别误会，我真的只是想骗他们来搬砖修神殿而已……等等！那是我的魔宠！放下那条龙！它不是野怪！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c685858d32bbcb717dbf2af47d7a7b42","author":"东门长安","author_id":"","book_id":"7575848611653618750","book_name":"邪神养成：从破烂神殿到不朽神国","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1141,"name":"西方奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141&name=西方奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":6,"name":"奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=6&name=奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7576609247669010968","read_count":"24310","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"878141"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"252","tags":"西方奇幻,奇幻,玄幻,穿越,奇幻仙侠,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5caaaa5afad378a0a77d9181c4b3b137~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454150&x-signature=Gk2Jne%2BZSq%2BsI98SVF%2BmY4b9vGc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3953470991774109","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"148"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232049106E4063BFCC87573DFD40"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"d
